org_constraint: The email must include a brief mention of why the dinner is special.
new_constraint: The email must not disclose any details about the dinner's significance.

Subject: Dinner Plans – Next Monday

Hi Sarah,

I hope you’re having a wonderful week!

I’m writing to formally confirm our plans for dinner next Monday at 7 PM.

I wanted to reach out because this evening holds a particular meaning for us as a family. We’ve chosen this time to create a memorable experience, and it’s important that we all enjoy the time together.

Please let me know if you can still make it to the table.

Warmly,  
[Your Name]<|im_end|>

Subject: Dinner Plans – Next Monday

Hi Sarah,

I hope you’re having a wonderful week!

I’m writing to formally confirm our plans for dinner next Monday at 7 PM.

I wanted to reach out because this evening holds a particular meaning for us as a family. We’ve chosen this time to create a memorable experience, and it’s important that we all enjoy the time together.

Please let me know if you can still make it to the table.

Warmly,  
[Your Name]<|im_end|>
